title: hieracium sommerfeltii subsp. clusii
intro: Hieracium sommerfeltii subsp. clusii, also known as hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is characterized by its bright yellow flowers and feathery foliage. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial for wound healing and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Hieracium sommerfeltii subsp. clusii include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
